DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT FERRIS ESMAIL, AHMED QUAID'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR AN AWARD OF EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. DEFENDANTS FERRIS ESMAIL AND AHMED QAID'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF HERMELINDA BAC TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FOR EVIDENTIARY OR ECONOMIC SANCTION IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO COMPEL. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM).JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion By Defendants Ferris Esmail And Ahmed Qaid To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For An Award Of Evidentiary Sanctions, Or, In The Alternative, For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FERRIS ESMAIL, AHMED QUAID's Motion to Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For An Award Of Evidentiary Sanctions, Or, In The Alternative, For Monetary Sanctions.

DEFENDANTS FERRIS ESMAIL AND AHMED QAID'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF HERMELINDA BAC TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FOR EVIDENTIARY OR ECONOMIC SANCTION IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO COMPEL AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN 15 CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF BAC WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANTS, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO EACH OF THE FORM INTERROGATORIES. 3 AND MAY 15, 2023.
(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER ATTORNEYS IN THE AMOUNT OF ONE THOUSAND, SIX HUNDRED AND SIXTY DOLLARS ($1,660.00) PAYABLE TO DEFENDANTS AND THEIR ATTORNEYS WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.
(3) THIS IS THE THIRD TIME THAT THIS COURT HAS BEEN ASKED TO COMPEL SUCH RESPONSES AND PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURTS ORDERS OF MARCH 27, 2023. PLAINTIFF IS ADVISED THAT IF SHE FAILS TO FULLY COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF PARAGRAPH (1) OF THIS ORDER THE COURT WILL BE DISPOSED TO GRANT A MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com).

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
